song_name: Fifty Shades Of Grey - Earned It
version_description: This version is with capo 3rd fret. This one also includes a riff just as played in the studio and acoustic version.

versions.song_name: Fifty Shades Of Grey - Earned It
Fifty Shades Of Grey - Earned It
versions.version_description: Corrected chords in last chorus and outro. Added 7th's.

tuning: E A D G B E

pro_brother.song_name: Fifty Shades Of Grey - Earned It

content:
This is the easiest verion with Capo on the 3rd fret 

There's also a No Capo version 

Capo 3rd                            No Capo

[tab][ch]Em[/ch] = 022000                 [ch]Gm[/ch] = 355333
Bm = 224432                 Dm = 557765 or 000231 (for the last chorus)  [/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch] = 000232          
G = 320003                  The last chorus is Dm, C, G, F.[/tab]


There's a riff after every Bm chord (Dm for no capo version) that is played... It's just for fun

For Capo 3rd          No Capo 

[tab]e|--------|          e|---------|
B|--------|          B|---------|
G|--------|          G|---------|
D|----0-1-|          D|---------|
A|--2-----|          A|---------|
E|--------|          E|--1-2-3--|[/tab]

  

[INTRO] [ch]Em[/ch] [ch]Bm[/ch] 

[VERSE 1]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
You make it look like it's magic[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
Cause I see nobody, nobody but you, you, you[/tab]

I'm never confused
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Hey, hey[/tab]

I'm so used to being used

[PRE-CHORUS]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
So I love when you call unexpected[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Cause I hate when the moment's expected[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
So I'ma care for you, you, you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'ma care for you, you, you, you, yeah[/tab]

[CHORUS]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]
Cause girl you're perfect[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]
You're always worth it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
And you deserve it[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
The way you work it[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Cause girl you earned it[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Girl you earned it[/tab]

3x Em  3x Em

[VERSE 2]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
You know our love would be tragic[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                                   [ch]Em[/ch]
So you don't pay it, don't pay it no mind[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
We live with no lies[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Hey, hey[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
You're my favorite kind of night[/tab]

[PRE-CHORUS]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
So I love when you call unexpected[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
Cause I hate when the moment's expected[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
So I'ma care for you, you, you[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bm[/ch]
I'ma care for you, you, you, you, yeah[/tab]
 
[CHORUS]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
Cause girl you're perfect[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]
You're always worth it[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Bm[/ch]
And you deserve it[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Bm[/ch]
The way you work it[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
Cause girl you earned it[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Bm[/ch]
Girl you earned it[/tab]

[BRIDGE]

[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
On that lonely night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
You said it wouldn't be love[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
But we felt the rush[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]                              [ch]Em[/ch]
It made us believe it there was only us[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                       [ch]Bm[/ch]
Convinced we were broken inside, inside[/tab]

[LAST CHORUS/ENDING]

[tab]                    [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch]                                  
Cause girl you're perfect [/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]Em[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
You're always worth it[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]Bm[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]
And you deserve it[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
The way you work it[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Bm[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
Cause girl you earned it[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Em[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Girl you earned it[/tab]


[ch]Bm[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch] - [ch]G[/ch]      |It keeps fading 
[ch]Bm[/ch] - [ch]D[/ch] - [ch]Em[/ch]          |Ends on [ch]Em[/ch]
